sigWerErrors.reason: 'El agente' (the agent) is replaced by 'La gente' (the people), which changes the subject from a specific person to a general group, altering the meaning significantly.
The insertion of 'una' ('a') before 'para el aumento' is unnecessary and does not change the overall meaning of the sentence.
Changing 'el límite' (the limit) to 'mi límite' (my limit) personalizes the statement but does not significantly alter the main intent of the sentence.
Changing 'de la tarjeta' (of the card) to 'en la tarjeta' (on the card) is a minor prepositional difference and does not change the overall meaning.
